rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MAY LING WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/13/19. (No earlier date available.) No proposed order. [LRSF 14.6 A.] No I&A has been filed yet. The address of the sole beneficiary cannot be in care of his attorney. The attorney's statutory fee in the prayer does not agree with the amount shown in the petition; an amendment must be filed. A petition for final distribution must show the net amount of cash distributable to the devisee and the specific numbers of shares securities, if any, not just the balances on hand in estate accounts.
